name: In Chicago, do courts punish people for AI hallucinations in filings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sanctions for unverified fakes; verify everything.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, courts sanction for unverified AI outputs with fake citations, similar to NY precedent applicable broadly.[2] Chicago follows federal/state rules emphasizing accuracy.[2] Key factors: Judicial discretion; attorney responsibility; case-specific harm. Always verify; withdraw erroneous filings promptly. Hire experienced local counsel.
